PushEvent:yasyf/captain-hook.summary: reworked signals — presence-union aggregation, first-class vetoes, and a per-hook consumed ledger (v8.8.0)

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-context.summary: shipped hash-verified edit-by-anchor (ccx code edit) and moved the sandbox onto pydantic-monty under uv (v0.6.0)

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-interact.summary: moved the web UI onto design tokens with a light-dark() dark palette and cut @cc-interact/react 0.3.0

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-notes.summary: shipped a cc-notes viz web UI — swimlane timeline and commit-DAG tabs with live SSE (v0.18.0)

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-pool.summary: landed a stable TCC identity and zero-touch File Provider onboarding

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-present.summary: restyled the web UI with a Graphite default theme, content tiers, and a system/light/dark toggle (v0.3.0)

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-review.summary: finalized the canonical installer provenance stamp and made --version print the exact release tag (v0.19.2)

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-skills.summary: added a wall_of_text nudge steering verbose turns to cc-present and a canonical repo-bootstrap plugin installer

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-transcript.summary: reworked the judge for model-free verdict identity, canonical keys, and a retrieval suggester (v9)

PushEvent:yasyf/fusekit.summary: added TryEnableFileProvider — File Provider appex election via pluginkit — and hardened the election scan

PushEvent:yasyf/homebrew-tap.summary: bumped casks for ccx v0.6.0, cc-pool v0.45.0, and fusekit-holder v0.33.1

PushEvent:yasyf/slop-cop.summary: dropped Windows and swapped in the canonical repo-bootstrap installer with bare per-arch binaries

captain-hook@v8.8.0.summary: reworked signals — presence-union aggregation, first-class vetoes, and a per-hook consumed ledger

cc-context@v0.6.0.summary: shipped hash-verified edit-by-anchor (ccx code edit) and moved the sandbox onto pydantic-monty under uv

cc-interact@v0.1.0.summary: first release — the domain-agnostic agent/daemon/web framework extracted from cc-review

cc-notes@v0.18.0.summary: shipped the cc-notes viz web UI — swimlane timeline and commit-DAG tabs with live SSE

cc-pool@v0.45.0.summary: landed a stable TCC identity and zero-touch File Provider onboarding

slop-cop@v0.1.32.summary: dropped Windows support and re-stamped the canonical installer

spawnllm@v0.5.5.summary: passed codex --skip-git-repo-check so verdicts run in untrusted cwds
